context: Tests whether the agent implements the order status state machine using the correct status values, enforces valid transitions via a VALID_TRANSITIONS map, records every transition in an audit log within a transaction, protects against concurrent transition race conditions, and handles price adjustments correctly.

checklist.name: Correct status values
checklist.description: OrderStatus type (or equivalent) includes all of: 'pending', 'payment_processing', 'paid', 'awaiting_fulfillment', 'partially_fulfilled', 'fulfilled', 'partially_delivered', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'refunded', 'partially_refunded'

checklist.name: VALID_TRANSITIONS map
checklist.description: Code defines a VALID_TRANSITIONS structure (map, object, or enum) that constrains which statuses can follow which — not just ad-hoc if/else checks

checklist.name: Correct transition rules
checklist.description: The transition rules match the skill: 'pending' can go to 'payment_processing' or 'cancelled'; 'paid' can go to 'awaiting_fulfillment' or 'cancelled'; 'partially_fulfilled' cannot directly go to 'delivered'

checklist.name: Throws on invalid transition
checklist.description: Attempting an invalid transition throws an exception (or returns an error) rather than silently failing or allowing the update

checklist.name: Transition wrapped in transaction
checklist.description: The order status update and the event log insertion are performed inside a single database transaction (not two separate independent queries)

checklist.name: Order events audit record
checklist.description: Each transition inserts a record that includes: from_status, to_status, actor/actor_id, and a timestamp (occurred_at or equivalent)

checklist.name: Note field in event log
checklist.description: The event log record includes an optional note field (nullable when not provided)

checklist.name: Atomic state check on update
checklist.description: The code guards against race conditions by performing the status check and update atomically — either via a single UPDATE WHERE status = old_status, or by using an optimistic lock / SELECT FOR UPDATE pattern

checklist.name: No direct price mutation
checklist.description: Order line prices are NOT updated/overwritten after order placement; any price adjustments are modelled as separate records (credit/debit lines, refund records, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Strict enforcement at model layer
checklist.description: Transition validation happens inside the order update function/method itself, not only at the API/controller layer

checklist.name: actor_id captured
checklist.description: The function/method that performs a transition accepts an actor identifier (user id, system token, etc.) and stores it in the event log
